init_hook: if ! command -v dh >/dev/null; then echo 'warning: debhelper not on PATH — install with: sudo apt install debhelper lintian' >&2; fi

lint: shellcheck bin/secureboot-notify sbin/secureboot-check sbin/secureboot-fix kernel/zzz-secureboot-recheck debian/postinst debian/prerm
clean: rm -rf debian/.debhelper debian/secureboot-watchdog debian/files debian/*.substvars debian/*.log debian/debhelper-build-stamp
